# Workspace Role Binding configuration

[Download JSON Schema](/docs/schemas/workspace-role-binding.schema.json)

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: libredash.dev/v1
kind: WorkspaceRoleBinding
metadata:
  workspace: operations
  name: operators-viewer
spec:
  role: viewer
  subject:
    kind: group
    group: operators
```
